fairs.title: Ferias: where community gathers
fairs.subtitle: Virtual and local fairs that bring buyers and sellers together in a shared space.
fairs.what.title: What are JMarkets fairs?
fairs.what.description: Fairs are organized events — virtual or in-person — where multiple sellers come together in one shared space. Buyers can discover many local producers at once, and sellers gain visibility as part of a community.

fairs.types.virtual.title: Virtual fairs
fairs.types.virtual.description: Online events where sellers share their stores under a common theme. Promoted across the JMarkets community.
fairs.types.physical.title: Local & physical fairs
fairs.types.physical.description: In-person market events organized by local communities. Use JMarkets as your digital presence at the fair.
fairs.types.barter.title: Barter & exchange fairs
fairs.types.barter.description: Special events dedicated to swapping products or services without money. Pure Social Solidarity Economy.

about.title: Born from community, built for community
about.subtitle: JMarkets was born in Guápiles, Costa Rica, from a university community project during the pandemic to reconnect isolated communities through their local fairs and barter networks.
about.queEs.title: Not just a store — a movement
about.queEs.description: JMarkets is a platform born from the TCU "Comer Orgánico" at the Universidad de Costa Rica, in partnership with the Feria del Trueque Verde Manantial in Guápiles. It lets entrepreneurs, local businesses, and communities create their own space online, publish products, sell (mainly via WhatsApp), and participate in fairs and barter — just like before the pandemic, but now with the reach of the internet.
about.queEs.point1: Sell and exchange products in your community
about.queEs.point2: Connect neighbors who were isolated during the pandemic
about.queEs.point3: Participate in virtual and local fairs and barter events
about.queEs.point4: Preserve and document community fair culture
about.mission.title: Our Mission
about.mission.description: To give communities the digital tools to stay connected, trade fairly, and keep their local fair and barter traditions alive — no matter what the world throws at them.
about.story.title: Our Story
about.story.para1: JMarkets was born during the COVID-19 pandemic as part of the TCU (Trabajo Comunal Universitario) "Comer Orgánico" at the Universidad de Costa Rica. We were working alongside the Feria del Trueque Verde Manantial in Guápiles, Costa Rica — a vibrant community space where people gathered to exchange products, services, and stories.
about.story.para2: When the pandemic hit, communities were suddenly alone and disconnected. The fairs that had brought people together for years went silent. We saw neighbors who had always found each other at the market now unable to connect — and we knew technology could help bridge that gap. So we built JMarkets: a digital recreation of the fairs that existed before, designed to let people show what they have, what they sell, and what they're willing to trade.
about.story.para3: From the beginning, we documented every step of this process — the community needs, the barter dynamics, the social bonds that make a fair more than just a market. That documentation lives in JMarkets. Today, this project continues growing as a tool for any community that wants to preserve its local economy and keep its people connected.
about.values.title: Our Values
about.values.fairTrade.description: Fair prices and dignified conditions for all participants
about.values.conscious.description: Promoting local and sustainable purchasing decisions
about.values.local.description: Every purchase strengthens local economy and neighborhood bonds
about.values.transparency.description: No hidden fees. Open and honest at every step.
about.team.title: A project rooted in community
about.team.description: JMarkets started as a university community project and grew into a platform used by real people. We are researchers, builders, and community advocates who believe that technology should serve people — not the other way around.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our community platform
terms.acceptance.content: By accessing and using JMarkets, you accept and agree to be bound by these terms. JMarkets is a Social Solidarity Economy platform born from the TCU "Comer Orgánico" at the Universidad de Costa Rica. If you do not agree with these terms, please do not use this platform.
terms.accounts.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account. You agree to use the platform in a respectful manner consistent with the values of the community: fair trade, transparency, and solidarity.
terms.services.content: JMarkets provides a digital platform for community fairs, local trade, and barter (trueque). Users can create their own space, publish products and services, connect with their community, and participate in virtual or local fairs. The platform was designed to preserve and extend the culture of community fairs like the Feria del Trueque Verde Manantial in Guápiles, Costa Rica.
terms.payment.content: JMarkets is a community platform. Any transactions, exchanges, or barter agreements made between users are the responsibility of the parties involved. JMarkets acts as a facilitator and does not intervene in private transactions between community members. Users are encouraged to operate under the principles of fair trade and honest exchange.
terms.intellectual.content: Content published by users on JMarkets remains the property of each user. The JMarkets platform itself — produced as part of the TCU "Comer Orgánico" at the Universidad de Costa Rica — is protected under applicable intellectual property laws. Users grant JMarkets a non-exclusive license to display their content within the platform.
terms.liability.content: JMarkets is provided as a community tool on an "as is" basis. We are not responsible for the content, products, or services offered by individual users. Transactions and agreements between community members are the sole responsibility of the parties involved. We encourage all users to interact with honesty and respect.
terms.changes.content: JMarkets reserves the right to update these terms at any time. Users will be notified of significant changes via email or a prominent notice on the platform. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms.contact.content: If you have any questions about these terms, please contact us at hola@jmarkets.com or visit our contact page.
terms.acceptanceNotice: By using JMarkets, you commit to participating in the community with respect, honesty, and solidarity. This platform was built to reconnect communities — we ask every user to honor that spirit in every interaction.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your information
privacy.information.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, make a purchase, or contact us. This includes your name, email address, password, and payment information. We also collect information automatically when you use our platform, including log data, cookies, and device information.
privacy.usage.content: We use your information to provide, maintain, and improve our services, process transactions, send transactional and promotional emails, respond to your inquiries, and comply with legal obligations. We use analytics data to understand how users interact with our platform and to optimize the user experience.
privacy.storage.content: Your data is stored on secure servers with encryption technology. We implement appropriate physical, electronic, and procedural safeguards to protect your information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is completely secure.
privacy.cookies.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our platform and hold certain information. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to alert you when cookies are being sent. However, some features of the platform may not function properly without cookies.
privacy.third.content: We may share your information with third-party service providers who assist us in operating our platform and conducting our business. These providers are contractually obligated to use your information only as necessary to provide services to us.
privacy.rights.content: Depending on your location, you may have certain rights regarding your personal data, including the right to access, correct, delete, or port your information. To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at privacy@jmarkets.com.
privacy.protection.content: We comply with applicable data protection regulations, including GDPR and similar laws. We maintain appropriate safeguards to protect your data and only retain information for as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with legal obligations.
privacy.contact.content: If you have questions about this privacy policy or our privacy practices, please contact us at privacy@jmarkets.com or visit our contact page. We are committed to working with you to resolve any privacy concerns.
privacy.noticeDesc: We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring you have a positive experience on our platform. If you have any questions about how we handle your data, please don't hesitate to contact us.
cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: Information about how we use cookies
cookies.analytics.description: Help us understand how you use our platform
cookies.marketing.description: Used to personalize content and ads
cookies.explanation: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They help websites remember information about your visit, such as your preferences and activity. Cookies can be essential for basic website functionality or used to enhance user experience through tracking and personalization.
cookies.browser: Most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings. You can choose to accept all cookies, reject all cookies, or be notified when a cookie is being set.
cookies.usingBrowserDesc: Most modern browsers include cookie management tools in their settings. You can typically find these under "Privacy" or "Security" settings. Different browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge) have different processes, but all allow you to view, delete, and manage cookies.
cookies.consentDesc: When you first visit JMarkets, we display a cookie consent banner. You can accept all cookies, reject non-essential cookies, or customize your preferences. You can change your cookie preferences at any time through your account settings.
cookies.thirdDesc: Some cookies may be set by third-party services (like analytics providers). These services have their own privacy policies and cookie management options. You can often manage these preferences through the third-party's website.
cookies.importantDesc: Disabling essential cookies may affect the functionality of our platform. We recommend keeping essential cookies enabled to ensure the best experience. Non-essential cookies can be disabled without affecting core functionality.
